data.title: Data Encryption at Rest
data.description: User data stored in databases is encrypted to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption applied to stored data.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts routine security audits to identify and rectify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Involves code reviews and penetration testing by security experts.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhances account security by requiring multiple forms of verification.
data.technical_spec: Options include SMS verification and authentication apps.

data.title: Malware Detection Systems
data.description: Monitors and blocks malicious activity aimed at exploiting user data or infrastructure.
data.technical_spec: Employs AI algorithms to detect abnormal patterns.

data.title: Zero Trust Framework
data.description: Adopts a zero trust security model to ensure network and data protection.
data.technical_spec: Authenticates and verifies every user and device attempting access.
